title: Malik's School Garden Through the Seasons
synopsis: Follow Malik as he discovers how his school garden changes through all four seasons, learning about nature's cycles and the beauty of each time of year.

pages.text: Malik loves going to school in the spring. He walks to the school garden every day with his class. The trees have tiny green leaves and the flowers are just starting to bloom.

illustration.description: A young boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes walks with his classmates toward a school garden in spring. Soft pastel colors show budding trees, early flowers, and fresh green grass. The same garden scene will appear throughout all seasons.
illustration.alt: Malik and classmates walking to the spring school garden

pages.text: In the garden, Malik sees yellow daffodils and pink tulips. The birds chirp happily in the apple tree. Malik plants sunflower seeds in the soft, dark soil. Spring is a time for new beginnings!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes kneeling in the garden planting seeds. Spring pastel colors fill the scene with blooming daffodils, tulips, and an apple tree with small blossoms. Birds nest in the branches.
illustration.alt: Malik planting seeds in the spring garden

pages.text: Summer comes and the garden is full of life! The sun shines bright and warm. Malik's sunflowers are now tall and yellow. The apple tree has green apples growing on its branches.

illustration.description: The same garden scene now in bright summer colors. Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes stands next to tall sunflowers. The apple tree is full of green apples, flowers are in full bloom, and everything is lush and green under a bright blue sky.
illustration.alt: Malik in the summer garden with tall sunflowers

pages.text: Malik waters the plants with a small watering can. Butterflies dance around the colorful flowers. Bees buzz from flower to flower. The garden is busy and beautiful in the summer heat.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes using a watering can in the vibrant summer garden. Bright summer colors show butterflies on flowers, bees buzzing around, and the garden in full bloom with intense greens and colorful flowers.
illustration.alt: Malik watering plants in the busy summer garden

pages.text: Fall arrives and the garden changes again. The apple tree has red apples ready to pick. Malik helps harvest vegetables and collects colorful autumn leaves that have fallen to the ground.

illustration.description: The same garden scene in warm autumn colors. Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes picks red apples from the tree. Orange, red, and yellow leaves cover the ground. The garden shows harvest time with pumpkins and vegetables in warm autumn hues.
illustration.alt: Malik harvesting apples in the autumn garden

pages.text: Winter brings snow to the garden. The trees are bare but still beautiful. Malik sees animal tracks in the snow. Even in winter, the garden is special. Soon spring will come again, and the cycle will start over!

illustration.description: The same garden scene now in cool winter colors. Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes bundled in winter clothes looks at the snow-covered garden. The apple tree is bare with snow on its branches, and animal tracks cross the white ground. Cool blues and whites dominate the peaceful winter scene.
illustration.alt: Malik in the quiet, snowy winter garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Malik plant in the spring garden?
questions.explanation: Malik plants sunflower seeds in the spring, and they grow tall and yellow by summer!

questions.question: What color are the apples when they're ready to pick?
questions.explanation: In autumn, the apples turn red and are ready for Malik to harvest.

questions.question: What does Malik see in the winter garden?
questions.explanation: In winter, Malik sees animal tracks in the snow covering the quiet garden.

questions.question: What insects visit the summer garden?
questions.explanation: Butterflies and bees visit the colorful flowers in the summer garden.
